creator: newbieman@perm.raid.ru
text:
portsclean -D
cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade
Detecting unreferenced distfiles...
cd: can't cd to /usr/ports/sysutils/portupgrade
/usr/local/sbin/portsclean:227:in `distclean': Cannot obtain DISTDIR! (RuntimeError)
        from /usr/local/sbin/portsclean:154:in `main'
        from /usr/local/lib/ruby/1.8/optparse.rb:755:in `initialize'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portsclean:69:in `new'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portsclean:69:in `main'
        from /usr/local/sbin/portsclean:691


I think this it affects whole port "portupgrade"

Fix: 

Change /usr/local/lib/ruby/site_ruby/1.8/portsdb.rb
-  MY_PORT = 'sysutils/portupgrade'
+  MY_PORT = 'ports-mgmt/portupgrade'
How-To-Repeat: Just run portsclean -D
